/archive/heist.title: Heist - SONANCE
h5: Dreamlike visions softened by time—an ambient space where clarity fades into mood.

/archive/numb.title: Numb - SONANCE
h5: Dreamlike visions softened by time—an ambient space where clarity fades into mood.

/archive/haze.title: Haze - SONANCE
h5: Dreamlike visions softened by time—an ambient space where clarity fades into mood.

/archive/bloom.title: Bloom - SONANCE
h5: Captured moments of growth and color—works that emerged, unfolded, and took root.

/archive/flicker.title: Flicker - SONANCE
h5: Brief illuminations from earlier days—projects that sparked, glowed, and continue to leave their light behind.

/archive/veil.title: Veil - SONANCE
h5: Layers of memory and meaning—lifted gently to reveal the archive underneath, quiet and alive.

/archive/summer.title: Summer - SONANCE
h5: Shot inside an abandoned warehouse. The movement was improvised to a custom ambient score played on-set.

/work/whisper.title: WHISPER - SONANCE
h5: Portraiture driven by micro-movements: blinking, exhaling, posture shifts. Camera positioning was tight but slow—observational, not intrusive.
In a world full of volume, WHISPER reminds us of the weight of quiet moments. It’s emotion stripped down to its bones.
Grain emulation (Kodak Tri-X style), localized dodging, low-contrast grading
p: Canon R3 / 85mm f/1.2 / Natural window light

/work/fiber.title: FIBER - SONANCE
h5: Macro lenses captured fabric fibers in ultra-close detail. Light pulses were synced with reactive microcontroller signals in real-time.
We wanted to bring soft tech into the visual space—where fashion and code can both feel alive.
Custom blend modes, color pulses driven by waveform data, animated HUD overlays
p: Blackmagic URSA G2 / 100mm Macro / Arduino RGB LED Kit
Form Labs / Studio Nervo / Hiro Matsu

/work/fracture.title: FRACTURE - SONANCE
h5: The camera mirrored every broken angle. Subjects danced through a maze of mirrored panels. Lighting was sharp, cold, and calculated—each reflection used as a framing tool.
This was an experiment in letting fragmentation feel whole—an ode to how brokenness can still feel structured and striking.
Chrome-tinted color grading, reflection masking, symmetry overlays, digital lens distortion added in post
p: Sony FX9 / Zeiss CP.3 / K5600 Joker HMI
Structure Lab / Arel Motion / Milo Grey

/work/nova.title: NOVA  - SONANCE
h5: Fixed compositions, symmetrical framing, use of tilt-shift lenses to create dreamlike focus pulls.
A visual whisper, designed to slow time and draw attention to subtle style shifts in fabric and posture.
Desaturated color tones, light bloom simulation, haze and glow overlays
p: Canon R5C / 35mm Tilt-Shift Lens / Arri Skypanel S60
Alana Vee (Model) / Kin Visuals (DP) / Elisia Kim (Set Design)

/work/glaire.title: GLAIRE - SONANCE
h5: Lens flares, handheld motion, neon ambient lighting, and POV-style framing.
A tribute to inner-city energy—the way streetlight and speed can elevate style.
Saturated grading, flaring overlays, real-time speed ramps
p: Sony A7S III / Voigtländer Lenses / Rgb Light Panels

/work/eclipse.title: ECLIPSE  - SONANCE
h5: Natural eclipse lighting, profiles only. Minimal fill light for shadow retention.
We wanted the subjects to be seen not as forms, but as outlines—style in essence, not in detail.
Crushed blacks, anamorphic distortion preserved, lens flares accentuated
p: Bmpcc6K Pro / Anamorphic Lens / Aputure 300D With Barn Doors

/work/rift.title: RIFT - SONANCE
h5: Static overheads, low wide shots, tilting camera with architectural symmetry.
Inspired by brutalist lines—we wanted to mirror human fluidity against rigid structure.
Muted tones, deep shadows, contrast curve mapping

/work/mirage.title: MIRAGE - SONANCE
h5: Slow-motion closeups, natural surface reflections, minimal digital effects.
To blur the border between dream and reality, using reflection as the central motif.
Soft highlights, water ripple overlays, diffusion glow pass
p: Leica SL2 / 50mm Summicron / Prism FX Filters

/work/silk.title: SILK - SONANCE
h5: Natural light only, long lens portraiture, minimal contrast.
We wanted to evoke softness not just in visuals, but in pace—emotion in every wrinkle.
Slow-mo color correction, skin retouch, silk texture enhancement
p: Phantom Flex 4K / Canon FD 85mm / Natural Light

/work/prism.title: PRISM - SONANCE
h5: Projector-based lighting only, ultra-contrasted primary colors.
To paint skin with color without digital post—organic effects through light, not pixels.
Minimal, in-camera effects pushed, analog textures retained
p: Blackmagic Ursa Mini Pro / Kowa Vintage Glass / Prism Lens FX

/terms.title: TERMS - SONANCE
h5: By accessing or using the Sonance Studio website and services, you agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions.
All content on this site — including visuals, text, and graphics — is the property of Sonance Studio and may not be reproduced or used without permission.
When entering into a collaboration with us:
We retain rights to any creative concepts or original work unless otherwise agreed in writing. Clients may use final assets as outlined in the usage terms agreed upon in the project contract.
We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of our website or services constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
p: ROJECT SCOPES, TIMELINES, AND PRICING WILL BE OUTLINED IN A FORMAL AGREEMENT.
A DEPOSIT MAY BE REQUIRED BEFORE PRODUCTION BEGINS.
FINAL DELIVERABLES WILL BE SHARED UPON FULL PAYMENT.

/work/vortex.title: VORTEX  - SONANCE
h5: Dynamic tracking shots, wide-angle lenses, and whip pans. Camera movement echoed the dancer’s own kinetic flow.
We wanted to capture instinctive expression—fashion in motion, not framed statically but living in chaos.
Grain overlay, motion blur preservation, high-contrast grading in DaVinci Resolve
p: Red Komodo 6K / Sigma Cine Primes / Dji Ronin 2 / Astera Titan Tubes
Luka D (Director) / Juno Raine (Stylist) / Jae Lee (Choreographer)
Fashion Film / Kinetic / Avant Garde / Choreography

/privacy.title: PRIVACY - SONANCE
h5: At Sonance Studio, your privacy is important to us. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you interact with our website or services.
We collect information in several ways, including when you visit our website, interact with our content, or use our services. The types of information we collect may include:
We use the information we collect in the following ways:
Your data is stored securely and is never sold or shared with third parties, except where necessary to provide our services or comply with legal obligations.

We take appropriate measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction. While we use commercially reasonable means to protect your information, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.
Your Rights and Choices
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Please check back regularly for the latest version.
p: Personal Identification Information: Name, email address, phone number, etc.
Non-Personal Information: Browser type, IP address, location data, device information, and usage data.
Cookies and Tracking Technologies: We use cookies and other tracking technologies to enhance your user experience.
To provide, maintain, and improve our services.
To communicate with you, respond to inquiries, and send relevant updates.
To personalize and optimize your experience on our website.
To comply with legal obligations and protect our rights.
Access: You can request a copy of the information we have about you.
Correction: You can correct or update any inaccurate or incomplete information.
Deletion: You can request that we delete your personal information, subject to certain limitations.
Opt-out of Communications: You can opt out of receiving marketing communications from us at any time.

/contact.title: CONTACT - SONANCE
h5: Whether you're launching a brand, crafting a campaign, or telling a story that matters  we’re ready to collaborate.

/archive.title: ARCHIVE - SONANCE
h5: From editorial series to cinematic brand films, every project here tells a visual story shaped by emotion, aesthetic, and direction.

/studio.title: STUDIO - SONANCE
h4: Founded on the belief that visuals should provoke, move, and elevate, Sonance Studio was built to blur boundaries  between art and commercial, between still and motion, between vision and execution.

We operate across disciplines, directing, capturing, and refining every layer of a creative project  from concept sketches to final grade. With an editorial mindset and cinematic treatment, our team delivers work that stands out in both craft and clarity.

Our process is collaborative, intentional, and bold — whether we're shooting on rooftops in London, developing custom color treatments, or crafting brand films for emerging designers. This is where concept meets control. Where visual stories come to life.
h5: Creative direction, image making, and visual storytelling driven by bold ideas, refined precision, and a deep commitment to visual craft.
From indie fashion labels to global agencies — our collaborators share a commitment to bold visuals and elevated execution.
Our work has earned prestigious awards and features in top publications, setting new creative benchmarks.
A collective of artists, strategists, and storytellers — united by a vision to create striking, meaningful work.
Felix Hart
Isla Kent
Theo Blake
Poppy Greene
Hugo Ellis
Ava Monroe

Whether you’re planning your first campaign or refining your brand’s visual identity, here are answers to some common questions about how we work
p: We start with a conversation to understand your goals, challenges, and creative direction. This is where we explore the heart of the project and ensure we're aligned from the start. Whether it's a one-time campaign or a long-term vision, we begin by listening.

This phase is where strategy meets imagination. We create concepts, moodboards, storyboards, and timelines. Every creative element is planned out — from shot lists to production logistics — ensuring we're fully prepared for what comes next.

Lights on. Cameras ready. We execute the plan with precision and energy — capturing moments, motion, and emotion exactly as envisioned. Our team ensures everything runs smoothly, whether it's on set, on location, or behind the scenes.
For small teams or personal brands needing a sharp visual story.
Designed for brands and creatives seeking premium, cinematic storytelling with a refined artistic touch
